rqs: What are the time and space complexities of QuickSort, Merge Sort, Heap Sort, Radix Sort, and Tim Sort compared to classic sorts in academic and industrial contexts?
Which sorting algorithm among QuickSort, Merge Sort, Heap Sort, Radix Sort, and Tim Sort provides the best scalability and throughput for high performance computing and embedded systems?
In which scenarios do stable sorting algorithms (e.g., Tim Sort) outperform unstable ones regarding scalability and throughput in benchmark suites and open source repositories?
